scripts.dev:api: npx infisical run --env=local --path=/ -- npm run start:dev -w apps/api
scripts.dev:web: npx infisical run --env=local --path=/ -- npm run dev -w apps/web
scripts.dev:landing: npx infisical run --env=local --path=/ -- npm run dev -w apps/landing
scripts.dev:mobile: npx infisical run --env=local --path=/ -- npm run start -w apps/mobile
